Class NobleFaceUP

java.lang.Object
Cards.Noble.NobleFaceUP
public class NobleFaceUP extends Object
The NobleFaceUP class stores the (player + 1) nobles which will be used / are face up on the table.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    NobleFaceUP(NobleDeck deck, int playerAmt)
    Initialize (player + 1) noble cards in an arrayList to be face up

    Returns face up noble card at specific index

    Returns an arrayList of all face up noble cards

    Formats and prints all noble cards in the noble face up deck

    Remove noble card from face up noble cards when it visits a player

  • Constructor Details

    • NobleFaceUP

      public NobleFaceUP(NobleDeck deck, int playerAmt)
      Initialize (player + 1) noble cards in an arrayList to be face up
      Parameters:
      deck - deck of all noble cards
      playerAmt - Number of players

  • Method Details

    • getFaceUp

      public ArrayList<Noble> getFaceUp()
      Returns an arrayList of all face up noble cards
      Returns:
      arrayList of all face up noble cards

    • getCard

      public Noble getCard(int index)
      Returns face up noble card at specific index
      Parameters:
      index - index of noble card in face up cards
      Returns:
      Noble object at specific index in face up cards

    • remove

      public void remove(int index)
      Remove noble card from face up noble cards when it visits a player
      Parameters:
      index - index of noble card to be removed

    • remove

      public void remove(Noble noble)
      Remove noble card from face up noble cards when it visits a player
      Parameters:
      noble - Noble object to be removed

    • printMarket

      public void printMarket()
      Formats and prints all noble cards in the noble face up deck
